scripts.title: Moderna Soars This Week
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped almost 19 percent this week.

beats.vo: This significant rise came after Jim Cramer expressed his liking for the stock, highlighting its year-to-date gains.
beats.caption: Cramer likes Moderna

beats.vo: The positive sentiment emerged as markets saw some rotation, with oil prices also dipping to pre-Iran war levels.
beats.caption: Market rotation

beats.vo: Investors are now watching Moderna closely as the final week before second-quarter earnings approaches.
beats.caption: Q2 earnings ahead

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna took center stage this week with a big jump. Find out why! For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Weekly Market Wrap: Apple, Palantir, and Chip Stocks
scripts.hook: Apple climbed almost 9 percent this week.

beats.vo: The tech giant saw this surge moving with the broader tech sector, as no specific company news was reported.
beats.caption: Apple with tech sector

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Palantir gained about 14 and a half percent after its CEO Alex Karp said enterprises fear for their intellectual property with frontier AI companies.
beats.caption: Palantir AI skepticism

beats.vo: In crypto, Coinbase rose over 11 percent as Bitcoin traded above 62-thousand dollars, fueled by renewed momentum for US crypto legislation.
beats.caption: Coinbase rides Bitcoin

beats.vo: On the downside, Micron fell almost 14 percent despite recent positive comments from Wall Street and Nvidia's CEO about strong AI-driven demand for memory chips.
beats.caption: Micron drops despite AI news

scripts.cta: What caught your eye this week?
scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: This week's market highlights included Apple, Palantir, and Coinbase on the rise, while some chip stocks dipped. Get the details! For information only — not financial advice.
